response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, leadership in AI-agent infrastructure, and exposure to MCP and cloud platforms, but lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years in production-grade AI solutions, vector databases, RAG architectures, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph, and his AI experience appears incidental rather than core to his roles.
strengths: Proven experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Strong cloud and DevOps exposure via AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD practices
Demonstrated technical leadership through workshops, open-source contributions, and mentoring
concerns: No clear evidence of 8+ years focused on production-grade AI/GenAI systems
Missing explicit experience with vector databases or RAG architecture implementation
AI-related work appears peripheral; primary focus has been on web, mobile, and infrastructure
